title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows someone packing for a holiday. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A young woman is packing for a holiday in her bedroom. She is putting clothes into an open suitcase on the bed. There are shoes, a sun hat and a travel guide beside the suitcase.

followUp.question: Talk about the person. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people watching a football match. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A group of friends are watching a football match at an outdoor stadium. They are sitting together and cheering. They are wearing scarves and there are many spectators behind them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
